code:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant Upstream
    participant agent-client-relationships
    participant if-or-hip
    participant Database
    participant des
    participant enrolment-store-proxy

    Upstream->>+agent-client-relationships: POST /itsa-post-signup/create-relationship/:nino
    agent-client-relationships->>+if-or-hip: GET /registration/individual/nino/:nino
    if-or-hip-->>-agent-client-relationships: Response (MTDITID)
    
    alt Partial Auth Exists
        agent-client-relationships->>Database: Read/Update: Check for and use partial-auth record.
        Database-->>agent-client-relationships: Response
    else Legacy SA Relationship Exists
        agent-client-relationships->>+des: GET /registration/relationship/nino/:nino
        des-->>-agent-client-relationships: Response (Legacy SA Agents)
        agent-client-relationships->>+enrolment-store-proxy: POST /enrolment-store-proxy/enrolment-store/groups/:groupId/enrolments/:enrolmentKey
        enrolment-store-proxy-->>-agent-client-relationships: Response
    end

    agent-client-relationships-->>-Upstream: Final Response

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个序列图，描述ITSA注册后建立代理关系的完整流程。核心是从Upstream发起调用，经过agent-client-relationships服务，最终可能落到数据库或者走遗留SA的迁移路径。
明白，我先确认几个点：Upstream到agent-client-relationships是POST请求创建关系对吧？然后agent-client-relationships需要先去if-or-hip拿MTDITID？
对的，路径是/itsa-post-signup/create-relationship/:nino。拿到MTDITID后有个分支判断：先看有没有partial auth记录，没有的话再走legacy SA的查询。
好的，我把主流程和alt分支画出来了。Partial auth存在时直接读写Database；另一个分支是legacy SA存在的情况，这时要调des的/registration/relationship接口，然后走enrolment-store-proxy做迁移。
enrolment-store-proxy那个路径确认一下，是groups/:groupId/enrolments/:enrolmentKey吗？还有des返回的是Legacy SA Agents列表？
确认，路径没错，des返回的就是Legacy SA Agents。两个分支最后都回到agent-client-relationships，然后给Upstream返回Final Response。
等等，des和enrolment-store-proxy的调用应该是异步返回，你画的是实线箭头，需要改成虚线表示response。还有if-or-hip返回MTDITID也应该是虚线。
已修正，所有响应都用虚线箭头了。另外给整个图加了autonumber，方便后续讨论时指代具体步骤。
完美，这个结构清晰了。从Upstream进入，经过if-or-hip获取MTDITID，然后alt分支处理partial auth或legacy SA迁移，最后统一返回。
